title: Xenial Spicy Thai Chicken Curry
description: A cultured and shaggy lazy-sunday Thai dish featuring sesame seed oil and ayurvedic-sattvic-friendly ingredients, this southern-Thai inspired curry is perfect for a relaxing afternoon meal.
instructions: Heat the sesame seed oil in a large pan over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until it is translucent and starting to caramelize.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the chicken to the pan and cook until it is browned on all sides and cooked through.
Add the Thai red curry paste to the pan and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Pour in the coconut milk and bring the mixture to a simmer.
Add the fish sauce, brown sugar, salt, and black pepper to the pan and stir to combine.
Reduce the heat to low and let the curry simmer for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Serve the curry hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
